steps.title: Identify the test results' significance
steps.content: The passage defines ocher as containing iron oxide and plant-based pigments as having high carbon. The test found no iron but high carbon—a profile that matches plant-based pigments, not ocher.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: This directly supports choice A's conclusion that plant-based pigments were used. Choices B, C, and D each add unsupported details: B and C speculate about why (availability, brightness), and D claims a historical ranking the data doesn't establish. That matches choice A — A is correct.
